title: rollandia lanceolata subsp. calycina
intro: Rollandia lanceolata subsp. calycina, also known as the Calycina Bellflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, native to the high-altitude regions of the Andes in South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rollandia lanceolata subsp. calycina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
